ch0259_41_sania/0101_0701_01_10:
Good morning, [Name:PlayerNickname ]!
Did you eat a proper breakfast?
ch0259_41_sania/0101_0701_02_10:
A good meal is important for studying! If you
haven’t eaten yet, let’s go to the cafeteria!
ch0259_41_sania/7101_0701_01_10:
Do you like how I altered my uniform?
I’m quite happy with it, personally.
ch0259_41_sania/7101_0701_02_10:
I especially like the ribbon! It’s a nice accent,
don’t you think?
ch0259_41_sania/7102_0701_01_10:
If you’re ever struggling with academy life,
you can always come to me!
ch0259_41_sania/7102_0701_02_10:
I’m here to talk about anything—from studies
to friendships!
ch0259_41_sania/7102_0701_03_10: Wait... Did I sound like a teacher just now?
ch0259_41_sania/7103_0701_01_10:
As a researcher, I just can’t get enough of
Pasio Academy.
ch0259_41_sania/7103_0701_02_10:
The library here has books from lots of
different regions!
ch0259_41_sania/7103_0701_03_10:
It also has the book I wrote! You should give
it a read!
ch0259_41_sania/7104_0701_01_10:
One of the best parts of Pasio Academy
is being able to attend lectures by all sorts
of speakers.
ch0259_41_sania/7104_0701_02_10:
From Professor Oak to Professor Sycamore,
so many prestigious Pokémon researchers
lecture here!
ch0259_41_sania/7104_0701_03_10: Ah... If only I could attend them all!
ch0259_41_sania/7105_0701_01_10:
Being called “Professor Sonia” is a point of
pride for me.
ch0259_41_sania/7105_0701_02_10:
But I’ve got to admit, hanging out with
everyone as a student is fun, too!
ch0259_41_sania/7105_0701_03_10:
Do you ever think about being a teacher for
a change, [Name:PlayerNickname ]?
ch0259_41_sania/1701_0701_02_10: Here’s a little treat from me!
ch0259_41_sania/1701_0702_01_10: I hope it encourages you to keep growing!
ch0259_41_sania/2501_0701_01_10:
Sometimes I teach at Pasio Academy as a
Pokémon Professor, but...
ch0259_41_sania/2501_0701_02_10:
On days I’m not teaching, I attend as
a student!
ch0259_41_sania/2501_0701_03_10:
Being able to experience academy life as
both a teacher and a student is such a
luxury, don’t you think?
ch0259_41_sania/2501_0702_01_10:
When I enjoy someone else’s teaching style,
I use it as reference for my own.
ch0259_41_sania/2501_0702_02_10:
Sometimes I think my teaching has a long
way to go, which dampens my spirit...
ch0259_41_sania/2501_0702_03_10:
But that’s exactly why I need to keep
studying at Pasio Academy!
ch0259_41_sania/2511_0701_01_10: Sitting at a desk is fine and all, but...
ch0259_41_sania/2511_0701_03_10:
Venturing out into the field to conduct
Pokémon research is the best!
ch0259_41_sania/2511_0702_01_10:
Maybe someday, I’ll find Pokémon unique to
the artificial island of Pasio.
ch0259_41_sania/2511_0702_02_10:
Wouldn’t it be amazing to share a discovery
like that?
ch0259_41_sania/3001_0701_01_10:
Morning! Let’s give it our all out there today!
And no matter what, stay positive!
ch0259_41_sania/3003_0701_01_10:
Hey! Don’t think I didn’t see you dozing off
earlier, sleepyhead. Come on, the day’s just
getting started!
ch0259_41_sania/3005_0701_01_10:
Are you still planning on running around
even after dark? Well, just watch your step,
all right? Stay sharp!
